questions.question: What is the primary purpose of Internet Key Exchange (IKE)?
keyPoints: To establish and manage Security Associations (SAs) in IPsec

questions.question: What are the two phases of IKE?
Explain the difference between Main Mode and Aggressive Mode in IKE.
keyPoints: Main Mode provides identity protection, while Aggressive Mode does not
Main Mode is more secure than Aggressive Mode
Aggressive Mode is faster than Main Mode

questions.question: Describe the purpose of Diffie-Hellman key exchange in IKE.
keyPoints: To securely exchange cryptographic keys between two parties

questions.question: What is Main Mode with Preshared Keys in IKE?
keyPoints: A variant of Main Mode that uses preshared keys instead of public key authentication

questions.question: Explain the importance of authentication and identity protection in IKE.
keyPoints: To ensure the security and integrity of the SA

questions.question: What is the role of IKE in establishing IPsec SAs?
keyPoints: To negotiate the parameters of the SA
To authenticate the parties and verify their identities
